mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms.boards (board_code, board_name_kor, content_type, description) VALUES (#{boardCode}, #{boardNameKor}, #{contentType}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT id, board_code as boardCode, board_name_kor as boardNameKor, content_type as contentType, description, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM cms.boards WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE cms.boards SET board_code = #{boardCode}, board_name_kor = #{boardNameKor}, content_type = #{contentType}, description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, board_code as boardCode, board_name_kor as boardNameKor, content_type as contentType, description, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM cms.boards ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT count(*) FROM cms.posts WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
